clinical_note: The patient is a 47-year-old male who was urgently admitted after being transferred from another hospital. He has been noted to have chills, fatigue, fever, and malaise during the hospitalization, which has lasted about 9 days. His white blood cell count is elevated at 21.6, with 86% neutrophils and a band count of 4. The patient underwent several procedures including arterial catheterization, endoscopic biliary stent placement, mechanical ventilation, central venous catheter placement, and hemodialysis.
label: High Infection Concern
